code:
type AccountError =
  | Overdraft

value Account
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Account
  a.copy(balance: a.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, AccountError>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err(AccountError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

let a0 = Account(balance: 100)
let a1 = deposit(a0, 50)

mut final_acc = a1
mut status = "ok"

match withdraw(a1, 30)
when Ok(a)
  final_acc = a
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

let current = final_acc

match withdraw(current, 500)
when Ok(a)
  final_acc = a
  status = "ok"
when Err(Overdraft)
  status = "overdraft"
end

println("final_balance=#{final_acc.balance}")
println("last_status=#{status}")
